inputs.label: Full-Scale Voltage Range (V)
inputs.businessContext: The total span of the ADC input voltage (max - min). For unipolar 0-5V, enter 5; for bipolar ±2.5V, enter 5.

label_i18n.es: Rango de voltaje a escala completa (V)

businessContext_i18n.en: The total span of the ADC input voltage (max - min). For unipolar 0-5V, enter 5; for bipolar ±2.5V, enter 5.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ADC giriş geriliminin toplam aralığı (maks - min). Tek kutuplu 0-5V için 5 girin; çift kutuplu ±2.5V için 5 girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die gesamte Spanne der ADC-Eingangsspannung (max - min). Für unipolaren 0-5V-Bereich geben Sie 5 ein; für bipolaren ±2,5V-Bereich geben Sie 5 ein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: L'étendue totale de la tension d'entrée du CAN (max - min). Pour unipolaire 0-5V, entrez 5 ; pour bipolaire ±2,5V, entrez 5.
businessContext_i18n.es: El intervalo total del voltaje de entrada del ADC (máx - mín). Para unipolar 0-5V, ingrese 5; para bipolar ±2.5V, ingrese 5.

inputs.label: Signal Peak Amplitude (V)
inputs.businessContext: Peak amplitude of the input sine wave. Typically ≤ voltageRange/2 for full-scale.

businessContext_i18n.en: Peak amplitude of the input sine wave. Typically ≤ voltageRange/2 for full-scale.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Giriş sinüs dalgasının tepe genliği. Genellikle tam ölçek için voltageRange/2 değerine eşit veya küçüktür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Spitzenamplitude der Eingangssinuswelle. Typischerweise ≤ Spannungsbereich/2 für Vollaussteuerung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Amplitude crête de l'onde sinusoïdale d'entrée. Généralement ≤ plageTension/2 pour pleine échelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Amplitud máxima de la onda sinusoidal de entrada. Normalmente ≤ rangoDeVoltaje/2 para escala completa.

inputs.label: Load Resistance (Ω)
inputs.businessContext: Reference resistance for power calculations. Use 1 if only voltage quantities are needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Reference resistance for power calculations. Use 1 if only voltage quantities are needed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güç hesaplamaları için referans direnç. Yalnızca gerilim büyüklükleri gerekiyorsa 1 kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Referenzwiderstand für Leistungsberechnungen. Verwenden Sie 1, wenn nur Spannungsgrößen benötigt werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Résistance de référence pour les calculs de puissance. Utilisez 1 si seules les grandeurs de tension sont nécessaires.
businessContext_i18n.es: Resistencia de referencia para cálculos de potencia. Use 1 si solo se necesitan cantidades de voltaje.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
